task: cmd/entire/cli/checkpoint/blob_resolver.go has a redundant hasBaseFile, as per copilots feedback: CollectTranscriptBlobHashes tracks hasBaseFile but then discards it (_ = hasBaseFile). This adds noise and makes the chunk-handling logic harder to read. Consider removing hasBaseFile entirely here, or using it to make the chunk collection rules explicit (e.g., include base file as chunk 0 only when present).
user_feedback_text: cmd/entire/cli/checkpoint/blob_resolver.go has a redundant hasBaseFile, as per copilots feedback: CollectTranscriptBlobHashes tracks hasBaseFile but then discards it (_ = hasBaseFile). This adds noise and makes the chunk-handling logic harder to read. Consider removing hasBaseFile entirely here, or using it to make the chunk collection rules explicit (e.g., include base file as chunk 0 only when present).
